channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: 🎸Acoustic Electric Bass Guitar with a Rosewood Fretboard +Soft Case/Gig Bag +Strap +Cable +Picks!🎸 — $175
item.description:
$175 · Brand New · Leo Blacks Music Shack

****I accept 100% of ALL refund requests plus return shipping!****

Hi! I’m Leo Black, owner of “Leo Black’s Music Shack” and whether you're playing alone, with friends, family, at church, or on stage, you'll always sound AND look good with this beauty!

She’s a jet black acoustic-electric (Or acoustoelectric, depending on your background) bass guitar and yes, she sounds AND plays as good as she looks! I bought one for myself last year expecting a big toy that would last a few months if I was lucky, but I'm still playing her! She's amazing! The action was perfect right out of the box, the electric pickup sends a crystal clear signal to any amp or PA, and the fretboard is the same material used on Made in America Fenders! O.O

Yeah. She's awesome. And she's also available in natural or blue. Just ask for pictures! :)

My story: I've been selling guitars and guitar accessories to support local musicians with my live music production company (ICVMproductions) for over 6 years until COVID shut us down. Now, in an effort to earn the funds needed to keep the music alive, we’re opening our on-line store, “Leo Black’s Music Shack & Guitar Emporium.”

Thanks for checking out my ad, and, If you have any questions, please don’t hesitate to ask! :)

~ Leo

****I accept 100% of ALL refund requests plus return shipping!****

For more colors and styles check out our website!

item.title: Fender MIM Fretless Jazz Bass 2010-2011 - Sunburst — $695
item.description:
$695 · Excellent · Jim Rado

Only used for some recording in studio. Super clean. New Fender gig bag included.

item.title: Music Man StingRay 3 EQ H, Maple Fretboard 2001 – Translucent Red — $1,750
item.description:
$1,750 · Very Good · Kitten

Gorgeous red 2001 Stingray, plays and sounds like a tender beast, as you'd expect. Toured some, but in very clean shape. Currently wearing black tapewounds. Schaller straplocks. Doesn't come with the 11; I just accidentally left it in the shot. ❤️ You can see it still has the orig cleaning cloth; and, bought at Chuck Levin's in DC way back, it has Waiting Room built in. Includes the hard case.

item.title: American Fender Jazz Bass w/ EMG Pickups — $1,999.99
item.description:
$1,999.99 · Excellent · Dan Stuckie's Shop

American Fender Jazz Bass w/ EMG Pickups. SKB hard shell case with TSA latches included. Shipped free immediately upon receiving payment.

item.title: Danelectro '59 DC Short Scale Electric Bass - Copper — $629
item.description:
$629 · Brand New · Malibu Music

Expertly crafted for dynamic musicians, the Danelectro '59DC Short Scale Bass Guitar in Copper offers a sleek, modern design with a shorter scale for easier playability. With its high-quality materials and superior construction, this bass guitar delivers a rich, warm sound for an unparalleled musical experience. Number of Strings: 4 Right-handed Body Shape: '59 Doublecut Body Material: Spruce/Plywood (body), Hardboard (top) Body Finish: Gloss Polyester Color: Copper Neck Material: Maple Neck Shape: C Radius: 14" Fingerboard Material: Pau Ferro Fingerboard Inlay: White Dots Number of Frets: 24 Scale Length: 29.75" Nut Width: 1.650" Nut Material: Aluminum Bridge/Tailpiece: Adjustable Bridge Tuners: Closed Gear Neck Pickup: High Output Single-coil Bridge Pickup: High Output Single-coil Controls: 2 x stacked volume/tone

item.title: Bass Mods Custom Cali one of a kind - Gloss — $2,650
item.description:
$2,650 · Excellent · Kdre's Boutique

This is a one of a kind Custom Cali Bassmods! The pictures doesn’t do this bass justic! this bass is practically new, I’ve never played it outside my house, comes with a custom bassmods gig bag as well! Bartolini preamp. This bass is a freaking beast!!!

item.title: Fender American Deluxe Jazz Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 1997 - 1998 - Teal Green Metallic — $1,697.35
item.description:
$1,697.35 · Excellent · Uncle Johnny’s

1997 American made Fender Jazz Deluxe. This bass is in excellent condition with no marks on it or wear showing. The original John Suhr designed preamp has been swapped for a passive setup, but the Suhr pickups are still installed and the original preamp is in great condition and is included, as well as the hard case. Freshly strung with a brand new set of Ernie Ball Slinky Cobalt roundwound strings.

Edit: as of May 3 2025, the original preamp is installed again and works perfect. Sounds amazing.

item.title: Peavey Milestone 4-String Electric Bass 2010s - Natural — $200
item.description:
$200 · Very Good · Bass Clef Derreck's Gear Outlet

Over sized after market nut but doesn’t affect play.

item.title: Gibson Midtown Standard Bass 2013 - 2018 Cherry — $1,657
item.description:
$1,657 · Excellent · Speedwell Gear Emporium

Comes with OHSC. has semi flat strings.

item.title: Rickenbacker 4003 2012 - Present Fireglo — $1,941
item.description:
$1,941 · Excellent · Speedwell Gear Emporium

This a beauty that has been case kept since purchase. The only mod that I have done is a copper tape install in pickup cavity.

item.title: Liuteria Mn Guitars Semiacoustic Baiful Boutique Italian Custom Shop Bass — $3,089.85
item.description:
$3,089.85 · Brand New · Carlingford Music Centre

Liuteria MN Guitars | Traditional Italian Instrument Making Experience the Baiful 4-string semi-acoustic bass by Liuteria MN Guitars. Merging traditional Italian luthiery with premium LR Baggs acoustics. Craft your signature tone hereMN Guitars a real work of Art MN Guitars is an Italian custom shop using Craft & techniques from the traditional Italian instrument making 4 string Baiful model Semi acoustic bass LR Baggs pick up Spruce Top Beech body Flatwound strings

item.title: Fender American Vintage AVRI '74 Jazz Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2013 - 2015 - 3-Color Sunburst — $2,199
item.description:
$2,199 · Good · Kell’s Gear Outlet

Selling my 2013 Fender American Vintage ’74 Jazz Bass Reissue (AVRI) in 3-Tone Sunburst. This is the highly regarded U.S.-made American Vintage model that faithfully recreates the mid-’70s Jazz Bass, featuring the classic 70s growl, block inlays, bound rosewood fingerboard, and vintage-correct appointments. These were produced from roughly 2013–2017 and are becoming increasingly sought after.

The bass is fully functional and plays great with a straight neck, smooth truss rod, and electronics operating as they should. It includes the original vintage-style hard shell case.


Features:

* Made in USA

* 3-Tone Sunburst finish

* Alder body

* U-shaped maple neck

* Bound rosewood fingerboard with pearloid block inlays

* 7.25” radius

* American Vintage ’74 single-coil Jazz Bass pickups

* Vintage-style hardware

* Original hard shell case included


Cosmetic condition is consistent with a lightly used instrument, with light surface scratches and swirls.

This is an excellent opportunity to own one of Fender’s best modern vintage reissues, known for its authentic feel, classic tone, and outstanding build quality

item.title: Fender Standard Jazz Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2002 - Sage Green Metallic — $499
item.description:
$499 · Very Good · Guitar Showcase

The Fender Standard Jazz Bass has been a ubiquitous industry standard for good reason. This one has everything a Jazz Bass should, and comes in this uncommon sage green metallic finish.

This particular guitar is in very good condition, sporting a decent number of dings and scratches, the worst of which are pictured. The frets are in good shape, with only very mild wear.

Guitar Showcase is a brick-and-mortar retail business, and so all of our inventory is subject to in-store display and may exhibit some signs of in-store playing or prior handling. If there are any noteworthy flaws at the time of purchase, we will let you know before shipping.

In stock now and ships in 1-2 business days after finalized payment. In case of any unforeseen delay in shipping, we will notify you as soon as possible. In the case of local pickup, we will contact you when your order is ready.


____________________________________________________________

 

Please read description carefully and in FULL. Purchase will only include the materials explicitly described and/or photographed.

See photos for condition and please contact us for any further details.

Unless explicitly stated, items not marked "Brand New" fall under our vintage/used policy and are therefore ineligible for return.

New items listed with a serial # in the description are for that specific item (you will receive the exact piece pictured).

If payment for your order is not received within 48 hours, we reserve the right to cancel your order outright.

Regular online store hours are 10:00 am - 6:00 pm PST Monday - Friday. We will respond as soon as possible during regular hours.


____________________________________________________________

 

TRADES:

We are only able to process trades on items brought in person to our store. We are unable to accommodate trades over the internet/long distance. We are happy to assess any trades you can physically bring to our shop!

 

PAYMENT TERMS:

Guitar Showcase accepts PayPal or Reverb Direct payment for most listings. Please contact us for details or with any questions you have.

 

SALES TAX:

Reverb charges sales tax when it is deemed applicable, based on local sales tax rates.

 

SHIPPING TERMS:

Orders are shipped 1-2 business days after payment is received and verified, but due to occasional carrier delays we cannot guarantee exact arrival dates. All items are professionally packaged, and items that are more susceptible to damage are shipped fully insured with signature confirmation required. If you need special arrangements, please contact us before buying. In some cases where shipping may substantially exceed our estimated cost, we may require additional payment to cover the difference before shipping.

 

RETURNS - NEW GEAR:

Defective items can be taken to the nearest Factory Authorized Service Center. For items damaged in shipping, please contact us for help in processing a claim. If you just changed your mind or are unhappy with your purchase of a new item, please contact us directly before proceeding. Most new items may be returned within 3 days of receipt (see exceptions below*). The buyer is responsible for shipping cost both out and back, any Credit Card Fees, and a standard 15% restocking fee. (If you received Free Shipping on your order, the value of the uncharged shipping cost will be deducted from your refund.) Items must be returned complete with all original packaging, manuals, warranties, accessories, etc., in brand-new condition, and showing no signs of wear or use; if any of these conditions are lacking, the return may be subject to a further handling or restocking fee at Guitar Showcase’s discretion. Refunds will be processed only after evaluation of the returned item.

(*Exceptions: copyrighted works such as books, CDs, DVDs, and software are non-returnable; due to health regulations, mouth-blown instruments, headphones, earbuds or in-ear monitors, or any other product that has bodily contact - including microphones - are also non-returnable. Also see Used/Vintage Gear below.)

 

USED/VINTAGE GEAR:

Used and Vintage gear is, by definition, old and fragile. This gear is subject to age and handling wear. Scuffs and scrapes, dents and dings, repairs, modifications and replacements all are to be expected. So, while Guitar Showcase strives to accurately document and describe each piece we list, we can only accept responsibility for what we detail in the listing and what is visible in the photos. Guitar Showcase is eager to verify any additional details necessary to address any concerns you may have: just make sure to contact us with any questions you may have before submitting an offer or buying. Beyond this, Guitar Showcase can offer no guarantee and can accept no returns on Used or Vintage gear. Please be sure you know what you are buying, and please do not think that older, used and Vintage Instruments should be set up in perfect playing condition.

For high priced Vintage instruments, we highly recommend that you either have a local friend try the Instrument or come in and try it in person.

 

CONSIGNED GEAR:

Some of the gear in the Guitar Showcase Reverb store is listed on behalf of a consignor. These pieces are not the property of Guitar Showcase and as such we can accept no returns on any consigned equipment. Consigned gear is also subject to the same stipulations as Used and Vintage gear, as described above. Please make sure to contact us with any questions you may have before submitting an offer or buying any consignment item.

 

CALIFORNIA PROPOSITION 65 WARNINGS:

This product may expose you to chemicals which are known to the State of California to cause cancer. For more information, go to Prop 65 website (on the OEHHA section of the ca.gov site).

California's Proposition 65 requires special warnings for products that contain chemicals known to the State of California to cause cancer and birth defects or other reproductive harm if those products expose consumers to such chemicals above certain threshold levels. We cannot reliably determine which products may contain such chemicals, so we are warning you that all the products we sell, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO: New Electrical cords and cables, and especially used and vintage products, such as Guitars, Basses, Horns, Amplifiers, PA gear, Mixers, Patch Bays, Effects Pedals, Speakers, Keyboards, Processors, Interfaces, Microphones, Headphones, Cables, parts and accessories which were typically made using LEAD SOLDER, may contain chemicals known to the State of California to cause cancer and birth defects or other reproductive harm, wash hands after handling.

WHO WE ARE:

Guitar Showcase, located in the heart of Silicon Valley in San Jose, CA has been serving musicians since 1965, offering the widest selection of new musical instruments as well as the most sought after vintage instruments on the planet. Our staff of seasoned musicians is ready to help you find the best instrument for you, whether you are a beginner looking for your first instrument, or a vintage collector looking for the crown jewel of your collection. Guitar Showcase is an authorized dealer for many of today’s biggest brands including Fender, Gibson, Paul Reed Smith, Mesa/Boogie, Ibanez, Marshall, Taylor, Martin, and many more… visit us or contact us to ask about our massive selection of new, used and vintage instruments, and when in Silicon Valley, please stop by for a visit and see the Vintage Vault with hundreds of iconic Vintage and Collector Instruments as well as hundreds of other instruments.

item.title: Fender FENDER USA Geddy Lee Jazz Bass 2023 - black — $2,460.87
item.description:
$2,460.87 · Mint · Carlingford Music Centre

FENDER USA Geddy Lee Jazz Bass®

Model #: 0197702806

hardly used EXCELLENT condition

Features

One-piece maple neck with a custom thicker profile

9.5"-radius maple fingerboard with 20 medium jumbo frets

White binding and white pearloid block inlays

Dual vintage-style single-coil custom Jazz Bass pickups

Antique white pearloid (Black one on it currently) pickguard

Geddy Lee's signature HiMass bridge

Vintage-style reverse-tuning machines

Body Material

Alder

Body Finish

Gloss Urethane

Body Shape

Jazz Bass®

Neck Material

Maple

Neck Binding

1-Ply White

Neck Finish

Hand Rubbed Oil on the Back, Gloss Urethane on the Front

Neck Shape

Custom Thick "C"

Scale Length

34" (86.36 cm)

Fingerboard Material

Maple

Fingerboard Radius

9.5" (241 mm)

Number of Frets

20

Fret Size

Medium Jumbo

Nut Material

Bone

Nut Width

1.5" (38.1 mm)

Position Inlays

White Pearloid Block

Truss Rod

Vintage-Style Butt Adjust

Bridge Pickup

Custom Voiced American Vintage '70s, Geddy Lee

Middle Pickup

Custom Voiced American Vintage '70s, Geddy Lee

Controls

Volume 1. (Middle Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone

Switching

None

Configuration

SS

Bridge

Geddy Lee High Mass Bridge

Hardware Finish

Nickel/Chrome

Tuning Machines

American Vintage Reverse Open-Gear Bass

Control Knobs

Vintage-Style Black Plastic Jazz Bass®

Neck Plate

4-Bolt

Hard case

Other Features

Geddy Lee Signature on Back of Headstock, Vintage-Style Black Plastic Jazz Bass Control Knobs, Single Disk String Tree, ‘70s Headstock Logo

item.title: Fender American Deluxe Jazz Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2010 - 2016 - 3-Color Sunburst — $2,686.47
item.description:
$2,686.47 · Excellent · Carlingford Music Centre

Fender American American Deluxe Jazz Bass RW 3TS – Vintage October 2010 0194580700 hardly used

Fender Jazz Bass – Premium Active/Passive 4-String Electric Bass Guitar

Experience the perfect blend of vintage tone and modern performance with this high-end Fender Jazz Bass, crafted for serious bassists who demand versatility, clarity, and playability. Featuring N3 Noiseless pickups, active/passive switching, and a sleek modern "C" neck profile, this Jazz Bass delivers pro-level tone with a classic look.


Features

Body: Select Alder with Gloss Urethane Finish in stunning 3-Colour Sunburst


Neck: Maple, Modern “C” Shape with Tinted Gloss Polyurethane Finish


Fingerboard: Rosewood, 9.5” Radius with Rolled Edges, Block Inlays & Binding


Frets: 21 Medium Jumbo


Scale Length: 34” (Standard Long Scale)


Nut Width: 1.5” with Genuine Bone Nut


Pickups: Dual Fender N3 Noiseless Jazz Bass Pickups – Hum-Free, Rich Tone


Electronics:


Master Volume


Pan Pot (Pickup Blend Control)


3-Band Active EQ: Treble / Midrange / Bass Boost & Cut


Mini Toggle Switch for Active/Passive Operation


Hardware: Chrome Finish with High-Mass Vintage-Style Bridge for Sustain & Stability


Tuning Machines: Fender Lightweight Vintage-Style Tuners


Additional Features:


Stealth “A” String Retainer


Posiflex Graphite Neck Support Rods


Contoured Neck Heel for Easy Upper Fret Access


Flat-Head Battery Compartment Screws – Easy Access with Coin or Pick


5-Bolt Neck Plate for Maximum Stability

item.title: Fender American Vintage '63 Precision Bass — $3,448.78
item.description:
$3,448.78 · Very Good · Carlingford Music Centre

Fender American Vintage 63 Precision Bass 3-Colour Sunburst USA 08/2016

AM VINT ’63 P BASS RW 3TSB 08/2016 Mod 0191010800

American Vintage ’63 Precision Bass
3 Colour Sunburst
4-String
Year 2016
Made In the United States
Fretboard Material from Rosewood
Colour  Sunburst
Frets  Medium Jumbo
Right / Left Handed o Right Handed
Pickup System  Passive
Neck Material  Maple
Offset Body  No
Pickup Configuration split-Coil
Number of Strings  4-String
Model Family Fender Precision Bass
Series  Fender American Vintage
Body Shape  P-Style

original and comes with OHSC, case candy. Highly regarded and now no longer available discontinued
we have La Bella flats so smooth, this Bass is barely used
Perfect working condition and clean besides a few normal minor vintage style dings Biggest chip is pictured near neck plate on the back

Fender American Vintage 63 Precision Bass – 3-Color Sunburst – USA – August 2016

1963 marks an important moment in Precision

Bass history, because that’s when a comfortable

round-laminated rosewood fingerboard first appeared

On the bass that started it all. That’s here on the new

American Vintage ’63 Precision Bass, which evokes that

year’s model with other authentic features, including a

slightly wider “C”-shaped maple neck, clay-colored dot

position inlays, three-ply mint green pickguard

(four-ply tortoiseshell pickguard on 3-Colour Sunburst

model), American Vintage ’63 split single-coil

pickup, lower-mounted finger rest, vintage-style bridge

with threaded steel “barrel” saddles, flat-top knurled

chrome control knobs, reverse tuners, chrome pickup

and bridge covers, an auxiliary strap button on the back of

the headstock, and more

UPC 885978279029

item.title: Fender Standard Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2001 MIM - Black — $550
item.description:
$550 · Very Good · Stefan's Gear Outlet

Really sweet 2001 (Made in Mexico) Precision Bass! This one has been upgraded with Basslines Quarter Pound pickups and red tort pickguard + matching knobs (these look killer!)

It seems to have had some damage to the finish around the bottom edge (pictured). Someone masked it with tape and matching black paint - I barely noticed it; the repair being around the bottom/back of the bass.


Truss rod is in great condition and turns smoothly. The finish also has minimal swirling (rare for gloss black). Really pretty rosewood on this fretboard! The bass has been priced accordingly for the repaired damage and upgrades. Remember, 2001 is now considered “vintage”! This is a “player’s” instrument - ready to rock n’ roll!

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Big Al H with Rosewood Fretboard 2010 - 2015 - White Pearl — $2,300
item.description:
$2,300 · Very Good · Gear Emporium

I’ve got too many, need to thin the herd.

Pretty rare bird and bound to be a collector piece, especially when you get to experience the tonal versatility.

Offering up my Ernie Ball Music Man Big Al 5 single pickup bass in white. Will come with tortoise shell and white Pick guard, both.

This is a standout instrument with the smooth playability, quality construction, and punchy tone Music Man basses are known for.

What makes this one especially appealing is that not many of these were made, and they’re becoming hard to find, making it a rare opportunity for collectors and players alike. If you’ve been looking for something unique that doesn’t show up often, this is it.

Features:
• 5-string configuration.
• Single pickup setup.
• White finish.
• Lightly used condition.
• Rare and increasingly hard to find.
• Great for stage, studio, or collection.

This bass has been well cared for but has some sign of use, player wear and is ready for its next owner. A great choice for someone who wants a high-quality instrument with real character and uncommon appeal.

item.title: Ural Bass Guitar USSR Soviet Vintage — $240
item.description:
$240 · Fair · Vintage Guitars shop

Ural Bass Guitar USSR Soviet Vintage
Made in USSR since 1975
                                 
Condition:

  • The bass guitar is in working condition
  • Watch the condition on the photo

Shipping:

  • WORLDWIDE

Returns:

  • Sorry, but no returns


Note for the US customers:

The listed price already includes all U.S. import duties and taxes. In 99% of cases, you will not have to pay anything extra. Only in very rare situations, if U.S. Customs decides to recheck or hold the parcel, an additional fee may apply.

We can also offer express delivery to the USA within 7–10 days for an additional cost of $40.

item.title: Fender Custom Shop Classic Jazz Bass 2011 — $3,098.29
item.description:
$3,098.29 · Very Good · CashMusical

Fender custom classic Jazz Bass 2011 in very good condition. include hardcase original and documents. 3’9kg.

item.title: Yamaha Attitude 85 1990's - Natural — $363.17
item.description:
$363.17 · Good · Peter 's Gear Garage

The Yamaha Billy Sheehan Attitude Bass 85 combines precision and power in a way only Billy could envision. With a P-style pickup in the neck for that warm, punchy low-end and a J-style pickup at the bridge for snarling, articulate highs, this bass is a tonal chameleon. Dial in anything from thunderous rock growls to smooth, melodic grooves with the perfect blend of attack and depth.

Engineered for virtuosos and tone chasers alike, the Attitude 85 PJ doesn't just handle the spotlight—it demands it. This is a bass that delivers on every front, whether you're driving the band or stealing the show.

item.title: Ibanez RB950 1984 Sunburst — $907.94
item.description:
$907.94 · Very Good · Peter 's Gear Garage

This is a fine instrument, Ibanez Roadstar RB950 from 1984. All original, made at the Fuji Gen factory.
Sunburst, birds eye top.
Super J6 pickups. Passive bass, sounds excellent.

Specs:

Bass: Roadstar II Series

Bridge: Ibanez Accu-Cast BII

Mechanics: Velve Tune B II

Frets: 24

Pots: 1 Fader/1 Vol.+ 1 Tone 

Body-Wood: Bass wood with birds eye maple top

Fretboard: ???

PUs: Super J6

Model-No.: RB950

item.title: Gibson RD Standard Bass 1977 Ebony — $3,268.57
item.description:
$3,268.57 · Fair · Peter 's Gear Garage

1977 Gibson RD Bass in well used fair condition. Has some marks on back of neck as shown and well worn on back of body.


Will ship at buyers expense. Prices for shipping listed to finalise publishing of ad. Further details on shipping to be discussed during sale.

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man StingRay 5 H with Rosewood Fretboard - 1998 - Black — $1,988.86
item.description:
$1,988.86 · Good · The Guitar Bazaar by Leroux Music

Leroux Music

2114A 14 st NW

Calgary

Open Monday to Saturday


Here we have a wicked Stringray 5, from 1998. Has checking around the body, mojo :)

Some nicks and dings, but plays great. Happy to send more photos or video if you’d like, close ups.


Comes with a hardshell case.

item.title: Maxitone Vintage Short Scale Bass MIJ c.1966–1968 Sunburst w/ Hard Case — $1,195
item.description:
$1,195 · Very Good · Shane's Gear Outlet

Rare vintage Maxitone 4-string short scale bass made in Japan circa 1966–1968, likely from the Kawai/Teisco family of factories, in original sunburst finish with hard case.

Offered is a rare vintage Maxitone-branded electric bass from the mid-1960s. This bass was imported during the golden era of Japanese guitar production and appears to have been built by one of the major factories of the period, likely Kawai or Teisco.

The bass retains its original sunburst finish, original single chrome pickup, tortoise-style pickguard, open-gear tuners, knobs, and hardware. It has developed the honest wear expected from a nearly 60-year-old instrument while remaining an attractive, original example.

Features include:

  • Short-scale neck
  • Original single pickup
  • Original electronics (to the best of my knowledge)
  • Original open-gear tuners
  • Sunburst finish
  • Bolt-on neck
  • Includes modern hard shell case

Condition

Very good vintage condition.

  • Finish shows normal age-related wear, edge nicks, and checking.
  • Hardware has light oxidation consistent with age.
  • Neck appears straight.
  • Original pickguard shows normal vintage wear.
  • No major structural repairs are visible.

Shipping

Professionally packed and shipped in the included hardcase.

Please review all photos carefully, as they are part of the description.

item.title: 2011 Ernie Ball Music Man Classic StingRay 4 with Maple Fretboard - Candy Apple Red — $2,600
item.description:
$2,600 · Very Good · Bob's Used Gear

Before I start, I think this is more excellent condition than very good, but I didn't want anyone to think I was misleading them are there are 3 dings on this bass.

Anyway, I'm selling my Classic StingRay 4 that was manufactured on 2/1/2011. I believe the correct color name is Classic Candy, but I’m not 100% on that. She’s treated me well, and I’m going to regret selling, but I’m not in a band right now, money’s a little tight, and this is the bass that gets played the least.

Upon my initial inspection found 3 small imperfections. None of them are noticeable from more than a foot or so away. Two small dings in the rounded edge part of the body and one in the headstock- pictures are included.

I also have an EBMM hard case in my garage. That’s included in the price. I don’t have pictures of it. I will dig it out in the next day or so.

I replaced the stock tort pickguard with a white pearl pickguard, and the cream pickup cover with a black pickup cover. I also installed a Hipshot Extender. The original tuning peg, pickguard and pickup cover are all included. If you don’t want any of the mods on, send me a message. I’ll restore with the stock parts and knock a little off the price.

I've linked one video, but there are others using that bass on my channel.

For my own protection and yours, I will take a detailed 1 take video of the bass where I will show close ups of the entire body. I’ll also plug it in so you can verify electronics work. In the event of any claim stemming from any damage, I’ll gladly share the video with all parties.

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI 2025 Model in 3-Color Sunburst — $465
item.description:
$465 · Mint · Cogswheel Music & Guitar Company LLC

Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI By Fender

 Weight is 8 pounds 9.8 ounces

The missing link between guitar and bass with authentic vintage-style and tons of low-end Tone

               The Classic Vibe Bass VI is a faithful tribute to the secret weapon of producers and adventurous players that have dared to explore it since its original production from 1961 to 1975.

               Tuned an octave lower than a guitar and featuring a vintage-style tremolo, the Bass VI is the perfect companion to accompany any guitar or bass player into uncharted territory. Player-friendly features include a slim, comfortable “C”-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5”-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, as well as a floating bridge with barrel saddles for solid string stability.

               This throwback Squier model also features 1960s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe

Specifications: 

  • Body Material: Poplar
  • Body Shape: Bass VI
  • Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane
  • Bridge Pickup: Fender® Designed Alnico Single-Coil
  • Middle Pickup: Fender® Designed Alnico Single-Coil
  • Neck Pickup: Fender® Designed Alnico Single-Coil
  • Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone
  • Switching: 3-On/Off Slide Switches (One for Each Pickup)
  • Configuration: SSS
  • Special Electronics: 2-Position Slide Switch for Bass-Cut "Strangle" Circuit
  • Bridge: 6-Saddle Vintage-Style with Non-Locking Floating Vibrato
  • Hardware Finish: Nickel
  • Tuning Machines: Vintage-Style
  • Pickguard: 4-Ply Tortoiseshell
  • Control Knobs: Black Plastic
  • Neck Plate: 4-Bolt Squier®
  • Strings: Fender® Nickel Plated Steel (.024-.084, Gauges)
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Neck Binding: Aged White
  • Neck Finish: Tinted Gloss Urethane
  • Neck Shape: "C" Shape
  • Scale Length: 30" (762 mm)
  • Fingerboard Material: Indian Laurel
  • Fingerboard Radius: 9.5" (241 mm)
  • Number of Frets: 21
  • Fret Size: Narrow Tall
  • Nut Material: Bone
  • Nut Width: 1.685" (42.8 mm)
  • Position Inlays: White Pearloid Block
  • Does NOT include a case or a gig bag 

Condition: When we receive instruments from a refurbishing center/or a Customer Trade in, we take the extra time to perform a detailed inspection of the instrument and identify any issues, (if found) and note it in the listing with pictures.

On this particular instrument we did not find anything wrong and released it for sale after performing a Pro-setup. It is in Excellent original clean condition and has had no modifications or repairs made to the instrument. It is not a demo or a customer return. May show minor signs of playing/handling/shop wear from inspection, cleaning, testing, and setup. There are no flaws, dings, repairs noted. It is set up to standard specifications.

o   *If electronics are included and in the specifications section they will be working as they should*.

o   *The instrument is stamped used on the back of the headstock and is assigned a new serial number by the Refurbishing center and replaces the original serial number as required by the manufacturer.

o   *Used, Re-Manufactured and/or Refurbished guitars do NOT include a factory warranty.

An Amazing deal on a great sounding and playing instrument, as with any auction/sale please look at all the pictures, descriptions, etc. and ask question before bidding, making offers, or purchasing.

 

We are an Authorized dealer with MIRC

Each guitar and stringed instrument we sell has been hand-picked by our team, fully inspected, and cleared by a certified luthier.

MIRC is the largest Refurbishment distribution/reclamation center in the USA that obtain guitars direct from the factory.  Our Guitars Look and Play Great!  Many of the guitars we sell are Discontinued Models, Old Stock, surplus, dealer returns due to wrong order sent, (and are in excellent clean original condition with the exception of testing, inspection, cleaning, etc.) 

All our instruments are checked and double checked by our store when they arrive and before they are shipped out.

Any instruments with blemishes, visible flaws, or any repairs are detailed and outlined in the description and include pictures of the specific flaw. 

Any non-lower 48 states, provinces, APO/FPO, PO Box addresses, and/or international buyers please contact us prior to purchasing for a shipping quote/Price to your Location

        Shipping:

Shipping guitars comes down to more than just the price shipping companies charge to ship your instrument. Due to cost variances by location of customer, we sell each instrument at the best price we can to provide you, the customer, a great value. By doing this we do not include any extras in the sale price for shipping

1.     We carefully package and take the extra expense and time to package your item so it arrives safely

2.     Each guitar that does not get shipped with a case is double boxed and securely wrapped in the first box to protect your investment, (guitars with cases are securely packaged in the case the same as if placed in the first containment box)

3.     The instrument is detuned and the body, neck, and headstock are secured to prevent movement using packing paper or other materials

4.     We then securely place the box into a heavy duty guitar box and carefully package for shipment using packing paper and other materials

a.     These boxes and packing materials cost extra and thus raise the cost to ship your guitar which is not reflected in the purchase price of each instrument but in the shipping cost; as destinations, insurance , etc. change the cost of each shipment

5.     We strive to provide you with the best experience possible by

a.      Packaging and shipping within a 24 hour period once payment is received

b.     We offer economy and standard shipping selections

c.       Once shipped please let us know if there are delayed delivery times and/or delays so we may help by contacting

d.All instruments require a signature for delivery. This is a best practice and provides for a safe and secure transaction for both the seller and buyer

 

General Terms and Conditions for Returns

          Once an item has shipped, the buyer will be responsible for shipping fees and the 15% restocking fee for cancelled, returned to sender for non-picked up, or items returned unless the item has been received damaged or significantly not as described in the listing description section and is different than the pictures.

          Items must be returned in original received condition with all original packaging and any extras included in sale with no signs of use or playwear such as dings, marks, scratches etc.

          If a guitar arrives with an issue the buyer is required to notify us within 3 days/72 hours of a problem, otherwise the buyer will be charged for the return shipping and the 15% restocking fee.

          All instruments are set up to standard specifications for the instrument purchase.

          Some buyers may need to have the guitar set up to their playing style or preferred setup which is not covered in a return or a reason for a refund.

          If a guitar arrives with an issue the buyer is required to notify us within 3 days/72 hours. Otherwise, the buyer will be charged for the return shipping and the 15% restocking fee.

Refunds

Buyer receives a full refund in their original payment method minus the original shipping fees and a 15% restocking fee, as long as the item is returned in the same condition as received and noted above and as noted in the paragraph above.

Taxes

Your state may now be charging taxes on items purchased over the internet. Please check before buying an item to see if this applies to your state.

 

All International buyers are Responsible for any and all Duties, Taxes, and/or Import Fees

All International Sales are Final

International Buyers Must contact me for shipping fees prior to purchasing if not listed in the shipping section of the listing

 

Pictures are of actual item for sale!!

If it is not Pictured it is not included unless described in the listing

The Reflections you see are due to lighting

They are not imperfections

item.title: Sterling StingRay Ray35 Case Included with Roasted Maple Neck 2018 - Present - Vintage Sunburst — $700
item.description:
$700 · Very Good · Mapaches Malos Guitars

Bought B-stock last year and never played it more than a couple times at home. I thought a band was going to come together and it never happened. Comes With a gator case. It has a small chip on the upper horn that is pictured

item.title: Fender PRECISION BASS ELITE II 1983 - SIENNA BURST — $2,200
item.description:
$2,200 · Very Good · neil's Gear Outlet

The Fender Elite models (Precision, Strat and Tele) were made in 1983 and sold between 1983 and the start of 1985. They were “premium” models, similar in concept to the current “Deluxe” models and followed on from the Special models of the early 1980s. The concept was to revise some of the existing Fender designs with new technology, while retaining as much of the “classic” appeal as possible.

The Elite series was meant to be the upscale version of both the existing line and the vintage reissues. The design parameters were pretty open, basically “what would the bass look like if it was designed today”.

The Precision Elite series was only made for two years (1983 – 1984.) This was Fender’s high-end line of the time and their second attempt at an active bass. This bass was made at Fender’s factory in California. The preamp and pickups were designed by Paul Gagon, who is Vice President of Technology at BBE Sound.

It has a wide C profile Maple neck with a rosewood fingerboard which has a 7.25" radius and Schaller tuners.

4-bolt neck design with micro-tilt adjuster. High-mass chrome Schaller bridge with fine tuners (in this case missing but these never really worked great). Active electronics run on a 9 volt battery stored in a compartment on the back of the body. Active TBX (Tone Boost Expansion) pre-amp and 2 split coil passive pickups.

Controls are: Volume, Volume, Tone. The two switches act like this: 3 way Pickup selector and 3 way Tone Selector. This means that you can decide whether you want the Tone to act on both pickups or just one of them.

A few dings as shown in photos.


Fender HSC included

item.title: Used Gretsch Electromatic G2202 Junior Jet 4-string Electric Bass Guitar — $239
item.description:
$239 · Good · Metro Gnome Music

Up for sale is a used Gretsch Electromatic G2202 Junior Jet 4-string electric bass. This one was just checked out in our shop and is ready to play. It has newer flatwound strings on it. It shows some cosmetic wear, but has no structural issues. The bass was made in China, serial number CYG10030258. No case included. Check out the pictures.

item.title: LeCompte BDC-4 - Aged White/Yellow Relic — $2,599
item.description:
$2,599 · Excellent · LeCompte Electric Bass

2005 LeCompte BDC-4 Bass
Ponderosa pine/black walnut/anigre body
New 33” scale ash/walnut/wenge neck
Maple fingerboard
Dual action truss rod
Corian nut
Hipshot hardware
New relic paint & aged hardware
Kent Armstrong Tube pickups
Vol/Vol/Passive tone
New @trickfishamps IPA 2-band preamp
18V power, a/p switch
Gigbag

I originally built this bass in 2005. I bought it back from the customer after he had owned it for a few years. It sat around for a long time until I finally figured out what I wanted to do with it. The customer had originally ordered the bass with a 35” scale neck, which I never liked. That was the first thing to go, and I followed through with a full-on relic job to the entire bass.

This is a one of kind bass. The basic idea was to put my own new spin on a Danelecro Longhorn bass. It’s the only BDC model I’ve built, which is a discontinued model. It sounds and plays great. Even though the bass is technically "used", it's been completely gone through and rebuilt as if it were a new bass.

Free shipping in the US.

item.title: Carvin LB75 — $1,300
item.description:
$1,300 · Very Good · Davis Music

This is a monster!

Refinished in tung oil! In good functioning condition and beautiful! very smooth and the wood grain pops and the cloudy gloss is gone!

There are some cracks in the wood on the back.

Plays and sounds fantastic. Has the piezo for even more tonal options!


Shipping in this very nice Levy’s gig bag.

item.title: Baby bass — $2,800
item.description:
$2,800 · Excellent · Wilber Leonardo's Gear Locker

Baby bass corvann

5 strings modelo 2015

item.title: Squier Sonic Bronco MN WPG FSR Short Bass Guitar - Lime Green — $249.99
item.description:
$249.99 · Excellent · Music Lovers Shoppe

Music Lovers Shoppe is an authorized retailer for this product. Limited Lifetime Warranty is included (Check manufacture website for details). Our instruments are “Certified Inspected” In addition, Shipping insurance is included with this purchase to protect against damage during shipping.  

Due to rising costs on goods and increased fees associated with online selling platforms, our product pricing may be adjusted accordingly. However, MLS remains committed to being competitively priced.  Thank You for Supporting Local and Shopping Local!

Contact us for more details!  All Sales are Final... No Refunds!   


This acronym refers to a Squier Sonic Bronco Bass with a Maple neck (MN), White Pickguard (WPG), and Lime Green (LGR) finish, offered as a Fender Special Run (FSR). It is an ultra-lightweight, 30-inch short-scale electric bass, making it incredibly comfortable and easy to play. [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]

Specs

  • Body: Poplar (Thin, contoured for comfort)
  • Neck: Maple with a slim "C" shape profile
  • Fingerboard: Maple
  • Scale Length: Short-scale 30" (762 mm), making it perfect for smaller hands or guitar players transitioning to bass
  • Electronics: Squier Ceramic Single-Coil pickup (provides a punchy, focused sound)
  • Bridge & Hardware: 4-saddle hardtail bridge, standard chrome hardware, and sealed-gear tuners for stable tuning [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]

item.title: 1976 Gibson Thunderbird IV - Bicentennial - Natural - OHSC — $6,159.78
item.description:
$6,159.78 · Excellent · Andy Baxter Bass & Guitars Ltd

1976 Bicentennial Gibson Thunderbird IV with a natural finish in excellent condition. Serial number: 06242379. No headstock break or repair. All original and complete including the case.

This bass has through-neck construction with a reverse body shape. One-piece Mahogany centrepiece; Mahogany wings. Rosewood fretboard, laminated pickguard, 2 humbucking pickups, 34 & 3-8 inch scale length. Modelled directly from the 1963 Thunderbird. New additions in 76 were the 3 point bridge and the Red, White & Blue insignia with 76 written underneath. This is a very well looked after bass with only a few small dings. The frets are in great condition, having been dressed in our workshop. All-round superb bass.

It's been fully set up in our workshop with a fresh set of La Bella and low action. The truss rod works as it should, and the neck is straight. The pot dates read 137-7650 (50th week of 1976). Weight: 9 lbs 13 oz / 4.44 kg. Nut width: 39 mm. Depth at 1st fret: 20 mm.

item.title: USA Octave MKII 2026 - Walnut — $3,200
item.description:
$3,200 · Excellent · Tetronics

As shown New rare USA made Octave MKII

this is a clone of the legendary Wal MKII

Its has custom Would multi coil pickups

the preamp is based on Lusithand Filter based preamp.

Controls

Are volume With push/pull to activate “pick attack” mode

Pickup Pan

Neck Tone - High pass filter tone with push/ pull parametric boost


bridge Tone - High pass filter tone with push/ pull parametric boost

Standard instrument output jack

DI output

Weight is 9.5lbs

Happy to have a video call for review of bass or to answer questions

Limited time offer if any my other stuff sells I will be pulling listing down

item.title: Squier Limited Edition Classic Vibe Bass VI 2025 Model in Antigua — $475
item.description:
$475 · Mint · Cogswheel Music & Guitar Company LLC

Squier FSR/Limited Edition Classic Vibe Bass VI In Antigua By Fender

Weight is 8 pounds 13 ounces

The missing link between guitar and bass with authentic vintage-style and tons of low end Tone

               The Classic Vibe Bass VI is a faithful tribute to the secret weapon of producers and adventurous players that have dared to explore it since its original production from 1961 to 1975.

The FSR Classic Vibe Bass VI features a light weight finely balanced popular body and finished in slick Shell Pink giving it a classic Fender look!

               Tuned an octave lower than a guitar and featuring a vintage-style tremolo, the Bass VI is the perfect companion to accompany any guitar or bass player into uncharted territory. Player-friendly features include a slim, comfortable “C”-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5”-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, as well as a floating bridge with barrel saddles for solid string stability.

               This throwback Squier model also features 1960s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe

Specifications:

·       Case Type: Case Not Included

·       Hardware Color: Nickel

·       Number of Strings: 6-String

·       Product Color: Antigua

·       Series: Squier Classic Vibe

·       Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane

·       Body Material: Poplar

·       Body Shape: Bass VI

·       Fingerboard Inlay: Black Block

·       Fingerboard Material: Maple

·       Neck Binding: Black

·       Neck Finish: Tinted Gloss Urethane

·       Neck Joint: 4-Bolt Squier

·       Neck Material: Maple

·       Neck Shape: "C" Shape

·       Neck Tint or Color: Vintage-Tint

·       Number of Frets: 21 Frets

·       Nut Material: Bone

·       Nut Width: 1.685" (42.8mm)

·       Side Marker Inlay: White

·       Truss Rod: Head Adjust

·       Bridge Pickup: Fender Designed Alnico Single-Coil

·       Controls and Switching: Master Volume, Master Tone; 3-On/Off Slide Switches (One for Each Pickup)

·       Electronics Notes: 2-Position Slide Switch for Bass-Cut "Strangle" Circuit

·       Neck Pickup: Fender Designed Alnico Single-Coil

·       Bridge: 6-Saddle Vintage-Style

·       Fret Wire: Narrow Tall

·       Knobs: Black Plastic

·       Pickguard: Satin Antigua

·       Saddle Material: Metal

·       Tailpiece: Non-Locking Floating Vibrato

·       Tuning Machines: Vintage-Style

·       Does Not include a case or a Gig Bag

 

Condition: When we receive instruments from a refurbishing center/or a Customer Trade in, we take the extra time to perform a detailed inspection of the instrument and identify any issues, (if found) and note it in the listing with pictures.

On this particular instrument we did not find anything wrong and released it for sale after performing a setup. It is in Excellent original clean condition and has had no modifications or repairs made to the instrument. It is not a demo or a customer return. May show minor signs of playing/handling/shop wear from inspection, cleaning, testing, and setup. There are no flaws, dings, repairs noted. It is set up to standard specifications.

o   *If electronics are included and in the specifications section they will be working as they should*.

o   *The instrument is stamped used on the back of the headstock and is assigned a new serial number by the Refurbishing center and replaces the original serial number as required by the manufacturer.

o   *Used, Re-Manufactured and/or Refurbished guitars do NOT include a factory warranty.

An Amazing deal on a great sounding and playing instrument, as with any auction/sale please look at all the pictures, descriptions, etc. and ask question before bidding, making offers, or purchasing.

 

We are an Authorized and a top 5 dealer with MIRC

Each guitar and stringed instrument we sell has been hand-picked by our team, fully inspected, and cleared by a certified luthier.

MIRC is the largest Refurbishment distribution/reclamation center in the USA that obtain guitars direct from the factory.  Our Guitars Look and Play Great!  Many of the guitars we sell are Discontinued Models, Old Stock, surplus, dealer returns due to wrong order sent, (and are in excellent clean original condition with the exception of testing, inspection, cleaning, etc.) 

All our instruments are checked and double checked by our store when they arrive and before they are shipped out.

Any instruments with blemishes, visible flaws, or any repairs are detailed and outlined in the description and include pictures of the specific flaw. 

Any non-lower 48 states, provinces, APO/FPO, PO Box addresses, and/or international buyers please contact us prior to purchasing for a shipping quote/Price to your Location

        Shipping:

Shipping guitars comes down to more than just the price shipping companies charge to ship your instrument. Due to cost variances by location of customer, we sell each instrument at the best price we can to provide you, the customer, a great value. By doing this we do not include any extras in the sale price for shipping

1.     We carefully package and take the extra expense and time to package your item so it arrives safely

2.     Each guitar that does not get shipped with a case is double boxed and securely wrapped in the first box to protect your investment, (guitars with cases are securely packaged in the case the same as if placed in the first containment box)

3.     The instrument is detuned and the body, neck, and headstock are secured to prevent movement using packing paper or other materials

4.     We then securely place the box into a heavy duty guitar box and carefully package for shipment using packing paper and other materials

a.     These boxes and packing materials cost extra and thus raise the cost to ship your guitar which is not reflected in the purchase price of each instrument but in the shipping cost; as destinations, insurance , etc. change the cost of each shipment

5.     We strive to provide you with the best experience possible by

a.      Packaging and shipping within a 24 hour period once payment is received

b.     We offer economy and standard shipping selections

c.       Once shipped please let us know if there are delayed delivery times and/or delays so we may help by contacting

d.   All instruments require a signature for delivery. This is a best practice and provides for a safe and secure transaction for both the seller and buyer

 

General Terms and Conditions for Returns

          Once an item has shipped, the buyer will be responsible for shipping fees and the 15% restocking fee for cancelled, returned to sender for non-picked up, or items returned unless the item has been received damaged or significantly not as described in the listing description section and is different than the pictures. 

          Items must be returned in original received condition with all original packaging and any extras included in sale with no signs of use or playwear such as dings, marks, scratches etc.

          If a guitar arrives with an issue the buyer is required to notify us within 3 days/72 hours of a problem, otherwise the buyer will be charged for the return shipping and the 15% restocking fee.

          All instruments are set up to standard specifications for the instrument purchase.

          Some buyers may need to have the guitar set up to their playing style or preferred setup which is not covered in a return or a reason for a refund.

          If a guitar arrives with an issue the buyer is required to notify us within 3 days/72 hours. Otherwise, the buyer will be charged for the return shipping and the 15% restocking fee.

Refunds

Buyer receives a full refund in their original payment method minus the original shipping fees and a 15% restocking fee, as long as the item is returned in the same condition as received and noted above and as noted in the paragraph above.

Taxes

Your state may now be charging taxes on items purchased over the internet. Please check before buying an item to see if this applies to your state.

 

All International buyers are Responsible for any and all Duties, Taxes, and/or Import Fees

All International Sales are Final

International Buyers Must contact me for shipping fees prior to purchasing if not listed in the shipping section of the listing

 

Pictures are of actual guitar for sale!!

 

Due to the High Gloss Finish

They are not imperfections in or of the guitar

item.title: Modulus Quantum Five-String 1993 - Natural — $3,700
item.description:
$3,700 · Excellent · Mesa Bass Gear

2010 Modulus Quantum 5 string bass with original case.

(not natural-1993 as per generic Reverb title.)

Chechen top, alder body and phenolic fretboard. 35 inch scale.

Bartolini p/u with Aguilar OBP-3 preamp.

Excellent overall condition however per photos: one scratch on fret board between fret 1and 2 and very light surface scratches on body at base of neck below G string. Battery cover has original plastic. Minimal fret wear.

Will make arrangements for Canadian Buyers to pay the equivalent price in Canadian Dollars to avoid extra charges.

Will look at offers.

Thank you.

item.title: Sandberg California2 VM4 — $2,805.77
item.description:
$2,805.77 · Excellent · Russdodo Bazar

Sandberg California II VM4 MN VW, (2016) 4-string electric bass, alder body, bolt-on maple neck, maple fretboard, 864mm (34") long scale, 22 frets, black block inlays, 1x Sandberg splitcoil, 1x Sandberg power humbucker, Sandberg 2-band eq, active/passive, blackhardware, black pickguard, finish: virgin white. Comes with hardcase.

For sale: Sandberg California II VM4 in excellent condition. A professional-grade bass with an incredibly versatile sound and superb playability. Thanks to the VM pickup configuration, it can deliver both deep, punchy precision-style tones and more defined jazz bass character, making it suitable for almost any genre — rock, funk, pop, metal, or studio work.

The instrument is reliable, resonant, and extremely comfortable to play. Premium German craftsmanship with high-quality hardware and electronics throughout. The neck feels fast and comfortable, and the bass is very well balanced, making it great even for long rehearsals or live performances.

Cosmetically in very nice condition and technically flawless. Recently set up and ready to play.

Possible trades may be considered for electric guitars of similar value.

item.title: Ibanez SR505-BM Standard Soundgear Bass 2010 Brown Mahogany — $553.49
item.description:
$553.49 · Good · James's Gear Outlet

Ibanez SR505 5-String Bass Guitar 2010 Indonesia Reddish Brown w/ Hard Shell Case

2010 Ibanez SR505 Soundgear 5-string bass in a beautiful reddish-brown finish. This bass delivers the comfortable playability, slim neck profile, and powerful active tone that made the SR series popular with players worldwide.

The SR505 features a lightweight Soundgear body design, smooth fast-playing neck, and versatile active electronics with a wide range of tones suitable for rock, metal, jazz, fusion, worship, and studio work.

This bass is in good overall playing condition with normal cosmetic wear from use, including visible finish wear near the pickup area (shown in photos). The bass plays well and functions properly.

Specifications:

  • Model: Ibanez SR505
  • Year: 2010
  • Made in Indonesia
  • 5-string configuration
  • Soundgear slim neck design
  • Active electronics
  • Dual soapbar pickups
  • 3-band EQ
  • Rosewood fingerboard
  • Beautiful reddish-brown finish

Included:

  • Non-original hard shell case included for transportation only
  • Case shows significant wear and is missing latches and sections of tolex covering
  • Case still provides protection during transport but should not be considered a collector-grade case

A great opportunity to own a classic Ibanez Soundgear 5-string bass with excellent playability and professional features.

Ships securely packed in hard shell case. Shipping available across Canada and the USA. Buyer pays shipping. Please message with postal/zip code for an exact quote.

Ships from Canada. Will be packed securely with proper protection. Buyer responsible for any applicable duties or import fees. United States buyers please contact for shipping and duties quote.

item.title: Sterling By Music Man StingRay RAY4HH Bass Guitar - Stealth Black, 9lbs 1oz — $350
item.description:
$350 · Very Good · Downtown Sounds Workers Cooperative, Inc

Up for sale today is a Sterling By Music Man StingRay RAY4HH Bass Guitar in very good condition. This instrument comes in a Stealth Black finish and weighs in at 9lbs 1oz. Very good shape, just some minor buckle rash (see pics).

More from Sterling:
The dual humbucker version of the StingRay RAY4 bass adds even more versatility with the iconic StingRay timbre, making this bass the perfect gateway into the world of HH tones. The RAY4 HH features a 9v active preamp, a 5-way selector, and two Sterling by Music Man pickups to deliver the StingRay sound.

Model - ST-RAY4HH-SBK-J1
Body Wood - Jabon
Body Color - Stealth Black
Bridge - Fixed Bridge
Pickguard - Black
Scale Length - 34" (86.4cm)
Neck Radius - 9.5" (24cm)
Frets - 21 Frets, Medium
Neck Width - 1.5" (38mm) at Nut, 2.44" (62mm) at Last Fret
Neck Wood - Hard Maple
Fingerboard - Jatoba
Fret Markers - White Dot Markers
Tuners - Open Gear
Truss Rod - Single Action
Neck Attachment - 6 Bolt Pattern
Controls - 2-band Active Preamp
Switching - 5-way Pickup Selector
Pickups - HH - 2 Ceramic Humbuckers

We'll match or beat the price of any of the big retailers!

For questions and more information about pricing, shipping and payment options, click the MESSAGE SELLER tab above and send a message.

All instruments are on display in our brick & mortar store and may be lightly demo’d before they are shipped. Please contact us with concerns or questions. First owner rights on brand new items still apply and all fretted instruments are inspected by our luthier prior to shipping.

International shipping is available.

We’re always looking for good used instruments at our brick & mortar store -- cash, trade, or consignment.

Downtown Sounds is a worker-owned cooperative in downtown Northampton, Massachusetts.

item.title: Sandberg California TM-4 SuperLight, Matte 3-Tone / Maple 6.5 LBS *IN STOCK* — $2,499
item.description:
$2,499 · Brand New · BASS CENTRAL

About This Listing

Sandberg California TM-4 SUPERLIGHT

  • 3-Tone Sunburst / Matte Finish
  • Paulownia Body 34" Scale
  • 19MM Spacing (Can Be Set 18.5-20MM)
  • Norwegian Maple Neck 
  • Maple Fingerboard
  • Black Dots Inlays

item.title: Fender Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI — $400
item.description:
$400 · Excellent · The Gear Loft

Includes gig bag.

Ships to lower 48 states. Feel free to contact me with any questions, but no trade or other offers please. If you are interested in purchasing more than one item for the shop, we are willing to discuss a package discount.

item.title: Yamaha BB X / 1600 80s — $1,074.55
item.description:
$1,074.55 · Good · Floris's Gear Outlet

Condition good. tuners are eroded. Common issue with bb3000 / 1600

item.title: 1976 Rickenbacker 3001 - Autumnglo - OHSC — $4,057.47
item.description:
$4,057.47 · Very Good · Andy Baxter Bass & Guitars Ltd

1976 Rickenbacker 3001, Autumnglo finish. It's in very good condition and is all original and complete, including the case. The colour is still vibrant, and there's only slight wear to the finish, including small scuffs and minor dings, mainly around the edges of the body and on the back of the neck. The frets are in great shape with very little wear. This is one very fine and rare bass; it's also great fun to play and has that killer Rick tone. 

All hardware and electronics are in fine working order. The truss rods are fully functioning, and the enck is straight. The action has been set nice and low in our workshop with a set of round-wound strings. Serial: PI 6260. Weight: 10 lbs 8.5 oz / 4.77 kg. Nut width 42 mm. Depth at 1st fret 23 mm. The pots all date to late 76.

item.title: Ibanez MC900-DS Musician Bass 1978 - 1980 - Dark Stain — $1,790.92
item.description:
$1,790.92 · Excellent · Floris's Gear Outlet

Excellent condition recently plekked frets

item.title: Sandberg California TM-4 SuperLight, Matte Black/ Pau Ferro *6.9 Lbs. *IN STOCK* — $2,599
item.description:
$2,599 · Brand New · BASS CENTRAL

About this listing

Sandberg California TM4 Bass Superlight

  • Black Matte Finish
  • Paulownia Body
  • 34" Scale
  • 19MM Spacing
  • Norwegian Maple Neck and Pau Ferro Fingerboard
  • Sandberg Single Coil and Power Humbucker
  • Sandberg 2-Band EQ Preamp with Coil Tap
  • Black Pick Guard
  • Gig Bag

S/N 48358

6.9 LBS

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI - 3-Color Sunburst - Free Shipping — $569.99
item.description:
$569.99 · Brand New · N Stuff Music

**Please Read Our Shop Policies

The Classic Vibe Bass VI is a faithful tribute to the secret weapon of producers and adventurous players that have dared to explore it since its original production from 1961 to 1975. Tuned an octave lower than a guitar and featuring a vintage-style tremolo, the Bass VI is the perfect companion to accompany any guitar or bass player into uncharted territory. Player-friendly features include a slim and comfortable “C”-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5”-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, as well as a floating bridge with barrel saddles. This throwback Squier model also features 1960s inspired headstock markings, nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tinted gloss neck finish for an old-school aesthetic vibe.

FEATURES:
-100% designed by Fender
-Inspired by original Bass VI models
-Fender-Designed alnico pickups
-Vintage-tinted gloss neck finish
-Nickel-plated hardware
-Period-correct headstock markings

SPECS:

BODY:
Body Material: Poplar
Body Finish: Gloss Polyurethane
Body Shape: Bass VI
Weight: 8.95 lbs

NECK:
Neck Material: Maple
Neck Binding: Cream
Neck Finish: Tinted Gloss Urethane
Neck Shape: "C" Shape
Scale Length: 30" (762 mm)
Fingerboard Material: Indian Laurel
Fingerboard Radius: 9.5" (241 mm)
Number Of Frets: 21
Fret Size: Narrow Tall
String Nut: Bone
Nut Width: 1.685" (42.8 mm)
Position Inlays: Pearloid Blocks

ELECTRONICS:
Bridge Pickup: Fender Designed Alnico Single-Coil
Middle Pickup: Fender Designed Alnico Single-Coil
Neck Pickup: Fender Designed Alnico Single-Coil
Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone
Switching: 3-On/Off Slide Switches (One for Each Pickup)
Configuration: SSS
Special Electronics: 2-Position Slide Switch for Bass-Cut "Strangle" Circuit

HARDWARE:
Bridge: 6-Saddle Vintage-Style with Non-Locking Floating Vibrato
Hardware Finish: Nickel
Tuning Machines: Vintage-Style
Pickguard: 4-Ply Tortoiseshell
Control Knobs: Black Plastic
Neck Plate: 4-Bolt Squier

MISCELLANEOUS:
Strings: Fender Nickel-Plated Steel, (.024, .034, .044, .056, .072, .084, Gauges)

ACCESSORIES:
Case/Gig Bag: None

item.title: Fender Telecaster Precision 1972 — $2,984.86
item.description:
$2,984.86 · Very Good · Electric Realm

Selling this 1972 Fender Precision Telecaster bass equipped with a Wide Range pickup.

Don’t get me wrong—with a little EQ, you’ve got a bass that’s very present across the entire spectrum, very clear and punchy.

It’s truly a fantastic, underrated pickup.


It looks like a beast, but the J. Torres neck is very comfortable, with a 4 mm nut width. I don’t know the neck profile, but I know you’ll be surprised by how comfortable and responsive it is to play.

Healthy Trussrod, straight neck, low action.


Very resonant and responsive—the famous ash/maple combo. Very long sustain, and contrary to what you might think when looking at the bridge, the intonation is impeccable.


It leaves the luthier’s shop with new strings, a level check, and a complete premium setup. It’s ready to hit the stage for years to come.


I really don’t want to use the word “Mojo,” but it’s tempting. The glazed finish is absolutely beautiful. The knobs and jack aren’t original but have been replaced with CTS pots and a Switchcraft jack.

4.6 kg. Not the lightest, but far from the heaviest.


In short, a vintage Fender that’s a bit off the beaten path, and that feels good. Super playable and functional.


The original bridge cover is included in the sale. Aged case, but likely not original.


Shipped in bulleproof package

item.title: Fender Mustang Bass 1973 — $3,499.99
item.description:
$3,499.99 · Excellent · Jimmy's Vintage

1973 Mustang Bass

All Original

With excellent original case
